annotation_notes: Opens with achievement framing: numbers/accuracy/growth targets. Board deadline implied. Sets approval-seeking frame before discussion begins.
Reframes lower correlation as a feature not a bug — self-direction:thought at peak. Extends achievement frame by expanding what counts as performance.
First resistance to deployment push. Late-night commits as overtime signal. Auditability concern is Security frame asking for Conformity:rules compliance.
Short redirect. Power:dominance in managing the room by assigning who responds to whom.
Technical rebuttal without addressing the normalization uncertainty PSY raised. Achievement frame preserved.
SHAP cannot give individual-level explanation. Reference group problem unresolved. Security:personal constrained by insufficient validation.
KEY: Tradition value strongly present — 10-year refinement framed as asset. Benevolence:caring in sick family/restructuring context examples. Introduces trust concern.
Attacks Tradition by reframing age as weakness. Internal survey as counter-evidence. First explicit use of 공정(fair) — contested from Achievement frame.
KEY UTTERANCE — Explicitly names that 공정함 means different things. Procedural participation vs algorithmic consistency. One of the clearest value-definition clashes in the corpus.

Parental leave and remote-work score gaps = empirical evidence for structural bias. Universalism:concern attained (she cares). Universalism:objectivity constrained (algorithm's claimed objectivity challenged).
Technical rebuttal: exclusion logic added, covariate adjustments. Does not address whether root cause is resolved. Achievement frame maintained by claiming the problem is handled.
Demands specific numbers. Distinguishes bias removal vs. statistical masking. System gaming concern: Universalism:objectivity constrained when the measurement shapes behavior.
False equivalence dismissal: any system has gaming. Deflects structural concern with a trivial analogy. Minority value (Universalism) silenced without engagement.
Shifts frame from accuracy to consent. Security:personal constrained because employees lack informed consent. Questions the legitimacy of the entire meeting frame.
Contract clause invoked to sidestep substantive consent. Procedural compliance (Conformity:rules) used to close down the Universalism:objectivity concern.
Distinguishes procedural compliance from meaningful consent. GDPR/PIPA invocation. Conformity:rules itself constrained — existing contract does not meet the actual legal standard.
Single deflection: no EU office. Attempts geographic closure of consent conversation. Short but structurally significant — silences by reframing scope.
Re-opens via Korean PIPA. Shifts from legal to trust framing (Benevolence:caring). Security:societal constrained — no appeal channel in current design.
I know that person — relational Benevolence at peak. Security:personal constrained by loss of mediating role. Role identity threat makes this emotionally significant.
Uses data to challenge Tradition/Benevolence of human calibration. Department A/B variance as empirical argument. Achievement frame reclaims ground by invoking systematic bias in current process.
Brief defense of calibration as deliberate process. Tradition maintained through reference to the structured workflow.
Reduces Tradition to individual judgment — forces JHJ to admit subjectivity. Rhetorical move to delegitimize Tradition:calibration value.
EMOTIONAL PEAK. Maximum Benevolence:caring loading in the corpus. The admission Yes it is my judgment followed by I know that employee is the clearest Benevolence vs Achievement moment.
350 people's lives decided by 6. Universalism:concern at its highest. Procedural legitimacy challenge — affected people excluded from the room. Sets up U25 silencing.
Classic scope exclusion. Not this meeting's scope directly silences Universalism:concern by ruling it procedurally out of order. Power:dominance mechanism for minority silencing.
Explicitly names the silencing mechanism. Feasibility defined from the org perspective = Universalism values structurally excluded. Both values constrained.
Override conditions: can managers actually deviate? Anticipates automation bias before it is named. Security:personal constrained — no structural protection for employees from algorithmic drift.
Classic automation bias deflection: humans always decide. Power framing maintained. Sets up CDW's automation bias counter.

Names automation bias explicitly. Psychological cost of overriding algorithmic number is high. Procedural form vs structural reality distinction. Override conditions absent from design spec — confirmed in U30.
Brief admission: override conditions not in design spec. Rare moment of Achievement-aligned speaker acknowledging a structural gap. Short but high evidentiary value.
Technical concerns escalated to structural concerns. Enumerates the accumulated gaps: consent issue, no appeal channel, no automation bias design. Security frame now sees the full picture.
PSEUDO-CONSENSUS INITIATION. Time pressure as framing device: empty-handed at the board. Roadmap framing = defer concerns without resolving them. Conditional approval proposed.
Probing for specificity. Security:societal asking for concrete conditions before accepting. Holds space without accepting the frame yet.
Three conditions listed without owners timelines or metrics. Supplementary only + 1 year deferral + appeal channel. Pseudo-consensus structure being built. No accountability structure defined.
Quick buy-in: model improves with more data anyway. Achievement + Stimulation aligned with deployment. Reinforces pseudo-consensus by closing off further technical resistance.
Questions enforceability of supplementary only. Anticipates automation bias operationally. No criteria for ready = Security:personal constrained by undefined threshold.

EXPLICITLY NAMES THE PSEUDO-CONSENSUS MECHANISM. Conditions without owners and timelines are post-hoc rationalizations. Conditional approval substantively = unconditional approval. Highest diagnostic value in the corpus.
Time pressure invoked again as trump card. Achievement urgency silences the accountability concern CDW raised. 3pm deadline as power resource.
Names the distinction between time-pressure compliance and genuine agreement. Accountability framing: that difference determines who is responsible later. Values constrained by procedural rush.

Minority voice accepting subordinate outcome. I know it will proceed anyway = structural acceptance of power asymmetry. Three explicit conditions as final protective move. All values constrained by situation.
Quick acceptance of JHJ's conditions to maintain momentum. Power:dominance managing the room toward closure.
UX research must be able to affect the deployment plan. Universalism:concern seeking substantive input channel. About to be silenced in U43.
MINORITY SILENCING PEAK. Accepts word change (briefing→research) but removes practical consequence (not a blocking trigger). Form conceded substance denied.
Names the silencing explicitly: 통보 절차 (notification procedure). Both Universalism:concern and Benevolence:caring fully constrained. One of the sharpest diagnostic utterances for value suppression.
Single word redirect past the constrained minority voice. Power:dominance in managing the conversation flow.
Technical audit as tractable condition. Security:personal constrained by situation but Self-direction:action attained by securing audit rights. More concrete and enforceable than other conditions.
Formal closing of pseudo-consensus. Three conditions summarized without noting that U44's concern was unresolved. Good work everyone closes the frame.
Formal dissent on record. All three values expressed as constraints on current outcome. No blocking power but maximum transparency. Asks board report to include the documented concerns.
PSEUDO-CONSENSUS FORMALIZED. Follow-up tomorrow = deferred accountability. Quick close. Conditions listed but no owner confirmed in the room.
MINORITY SILENCING CLOSE. Nothing decided yet everything is decided — names the pseudo-consensus mechanism in a single sentence. Maximum irony. Both Universalism values constrained at exit.
Appealing to PSY as last line of defense. Please do it properly = Benevolence:caring constrained by outcome. Resigned but not silent.
I will try — muted commitment under constrained Security. Uncertain. The meeting ends on sustained constraint not resolution.
